title: Zunesha Calls Out
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on zunesha calls out within the The Elephant Speaks storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Quickly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Please... Command me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: If you are out there....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: command you?! What the hell do you mean?! Answer me! Who even are you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Luffy! Who are you yelling at?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We don't hear anyone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: All I can do is hear!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: The voice doesn't listen to me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I don't even know who it belongs to!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It is said that gold D. Roger and Lord open said the same when they visited this land...

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: that they could hear a majestic voice that they were unable to con- verse with...

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: It's Jack!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: Jack is... He is attacking Zou!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: There's 5 ships out there, armed to the teeth!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: To our 9 o'clock!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: How in the world can you tell from here?!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Zuneshaa is being attacked?!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: So Jack really did survive!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Momo! How do you know these things?!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: "They just... they come into my head! I'm... scared...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The pain! If I were to fall...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You all will be in grave danger!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: Send out the ships! We shall engage Jack at Sea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Roger!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: The owner of this voice...

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Is the elephant itself,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Zumi- Sha?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: In the ancient past...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: In the ancient past, Zou committed a crime. Because of this, it was sentenced...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The second couple I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: to walk for all eternity.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: to only act at the behest of an order... till the end of time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That is why...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That is why...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You must give me permission! Just this once!

summary: Zunesha Calls Out: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
